column3: Calculate the total cost of the call

column1: * Higher rate applies only to the first 20 minutes
* Lower rate applies to the remaining 66 minutes
* Result must be the sum of both billing tiers

column2: Number of girls in the park

column3: Calculate the total number of kids in the park

column1: * Boys count is derived as two-thirds of the girls count

column3: Calculate total earnings for the year

column1: * Total working days = weeks per month _ days per week _ months in a year
* Total earnings = total working days _ daily pay

column2: Periods for a normal student per day
Extra classes Liam takes per day

column3: Calculate total hours Liam spends learning per week

column1: * Liam's daily classes = normal periods + extra class
* Weekly class minutes = daily classes _ class duration _ days per week
* Saturday and Sunday extra learning = 1/7 of weekly class minutes each
* Total weekly learning = weekly class minutes + Saturday extra + Sunday extra
* Final answer must be in hours

column3: Calculate the final value of all of Kayla's shares

column1: * Final total value = final price per share _ number of shares

column2: Cost of each subsequent paid hour
column3: Twice the cost of the previous hour
Calculate the total amount Kai paid

column1: * Total hours = 4; free hours = 2; therefore paid hours = 2
* Each hour after the first paid hour is twice the cost of the previous paid hour

column2: New infections per infected person per day

column3: Calculate the total number of people infected after 3 days

column1: * Each day, every currently infected person infects 3 new people
* Total infected grows each day by (current infected count _ 3)

column3: Calculate the total number of dozens of eggs Nia will need

column1: * Final answer must be in dozens (1 dozen = 12 eggs)

column3: Half the rate of the previous 30 seconds
A quarter of the final 30-second amount
Calculate the total number of pieces of popcorn

column1: * Each interval's count is derived from the initial popping rate of 60
* Residual heat pops an additional quarter of the final 30-second count
* Total = sum of all four 30-second intervals + residual heat popped kernels

column3: Calculate the grams of water left after making all cubes

column1: * Remaining water = total water _ water used

column2: New potted plants received two days ago
Plants to be given away per ledge tomorrow

column3: Calculate how many potted plants Camila will have remaining

column1: * Total plants before giveaway = (ledges _ plants per ledge) + new plants received
* Plants given away = ledges _ plants given per ledge
* Remaining plants = total plants _ plants given away

column3: Two times the speed on the beach

column2: Time spent walking on the beach

column3: Calculate the total time to complete the entire 24-kilometer walk, in minutes

column1: * Beach distance and sidewalk distance are equal (12 km each)
* Time on sidewalk = time on beach / 2 (since speed is double)
* Total time = beach time + sidewalk time

column3: Calculate the average percentage of the workday spent cleaning floors

column1: * Total cleaning time = total floors _ time per floor
* Daily cleaning time = total cleaning time / number of days
* Percentage = (daily cleaning time / total daily work minutes) _ 100

column3: Round all prices to the nearest dollar
Calculate total earnings after rounding prices

column1: * All prices must be rounded to the nearest whole dollar before calculating
* Total = (rounded tulip price _ 12) + (rounded rose price _ 29) + (rounded sunflower price _ 37)

column3: Calculate the number of trips needed to transport all items

column1: * Total weight = sum of all items
* Effective capacity per trip = truck capacity _ number of trucks
* Number of trips = total weight / effective capacity per trip, rounded up

column2: Orange pie boxes sold on Friday
column3: 13 fewer than Saturday's orange pie sales

column2: Orange pie boxes sold on Saturday

column3: Equal to combined sales of Friday and Saturday

column1: * Friday and Saturday sales must be calculated first before determining Sunday sales
* Sunday sales (cookies + pies) = Friday total + Saturday total
* Total earnings = (total cookie boxes _ £12) + (total orange pie boxes _ £21)
* Average daily earnings = total earnings / 3 days

column3: Calculate the total points Emma is sure to get

column1: * Remaining questions after physics and algebra are equally split between chemistry and history
* Total sure points = sum of correct answers across all four subjects

column3: Calculate how many 45-minute episodes Tariq watched on Sunday

column1: * Total known TV time (excluding Sunday) must be subtracted from 22 hours
* Number of Sunday episodes = Sunday viewing time / 45 minutes

column3: Six times as many as Ava
Three dozen more than Quinn and Ava combined
Calculate how many eggs are still hidden in the yard

column1: * Each finder's count is derived from the values above
* Total found = sum of all individual finds
* Remaining eggs = total hidden _ total found
